hero.subtitle: Workflow Coworking Space
hero.title: Your best work gets done
hero.description: The first ever coworking space and study hub in Ozamiz City and Misamis Occidental

about.title: About us
paragraphs: Made by the passionate, for the passionate.
Workflow Coworking Space is the first ever hub in the heart of Ozamiz City and Misamis Occidental, designed to inspire productivity and collaboration.
We provide a welcoming space for freelancers, students, and entrepreneurs to work, connect, and grow together.
about.imageAlt: Workflow Coworking Space - people working together

ourSpace.title: Our Space
ourSpace.description: Designed to inspire productivity and creativity, our space welcomes students, freelancers, entrepreneurs, and anyone in search of a comfortable place to work or unwind. Enjoy a wide selection of beverages from coffee favorites and milk based drinks to matcha and more paired perfectly with satisfying rice meals and snacks. Simply place your order, settle in, and make the space your own for the day. Planning something bigger? You can also book the entire venue for events, seminars, and special gatherings.

bestSellingItems.description: Our best-selling items are loved for their rich flavors and satisfying quality. From creamy coffee favorites to hearty, flavorful food, each product is crafted to deliver comfort and enjoyment making them the top choices our customers keep coming back for.

items.name: Signature Matcha Latte
items.description: A refreshing iced matcha latte with vibrant green matcha layered over creamy milk and ice for a smooth, earthy, and lightly sweet flavor.

items.name: Ube Spanish Latte
items.description: A stunning iced Ube Spanish latte a creamy, layered Filipino-inspired drink featuring vibrant purple ube (sweet purple yam with nutty vanilla notes).

items.name: Dirty Matcha Latte
items.description: A refreshing iced dirty matcha latte a striking layered drink featuring vibrant green matcha blended with creamy milk at the bottom, topped with a bold espresso pour that creates mesmerizing swirls of caramel-brown over ice.

items.name: Caramel Macchiato
items.description: Iced caramel macchiato layered with milk, espresso, caramel drizzle, and topped with whipped cream.

items.title: Signature CLOUD SERIES
items.description: Try our new Cloud Series drinks—fluffy, dreamy, and perfect for any moment.

items.title: Brain Booster
items.description: Fuel your focus with our Brain Booster lineup. Stay sharp and productive.

items.title: Coffee Shop Setup
items.description: We've upgraded our coffee setup for a better brew every time.

items.title: Savory Selections
items.description: New savory items now on the menu. Hearty and satisfying.

items.title: 2ND ANNIVERSARY CELEBRATION
items.description: Celebrate two years with us! Join the party and enjoy special offers.

items.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
items.answer: We kindly ask that no outside food or drinks be brought into Workflow. Enjoy our selection of fresh drinks, rice meals, and snacks while you work or study!

items.question: Can I book the space for events or seminars?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can rent the entire space for events, workshops, or seminars. Contact us to check availability and rates.

items.question: Do I need to sign in to order drinks or meals?
items.answer: No sign-in is required! You can order as a guest and pay at the counter, and pick up your order which is simple, fast, and convenient.

communitySays.title: What our community says
communitySays.subtitle: Real experiences from freelancers, students, and visitors

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.quote: The best spot in Ozamiz to get work done. Fast wifi, great coffee, and the staff are always friendly. I come here almost every week.

reviews.name: Jake T.
reviews.quote: Perfect for studying with friends. Quiet enough to focus but the vibe is never boring. Love the matcha and the rice meals when we pull all-nighters.

reviews.name: Ana L.
reviews.quote: We held our first meetup here and the space was ideal. Good seating, good drinks, and the team helped us with setup. Will definitely book again.

reviews.name: Rico M.
reviews.quote: Reliable internet and plenty of outlets. The ube latte is my go-to. Workflow feels like a second office.

reviews.name: Patricia G.
reviews.quote: Stumbled upon Workflow while in town. Cozy, clean, and the caramel macchiato hit the spot. Would recommend to anyone passing through Ozamiz.
